overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting neon lights, crossing busy intersections, and ascending through a pink-lit passage to an elevated plaza with illuminated cherry blossom trees. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown sidewalk with wet reflective pavement

events.description: stepping onto the illuminated yellow crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
reaching the opposite sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk and crossing the neon-lit street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person holding a colorful umbrella crossing the street from the right side

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers covered in bright red and blue neon advertisements and signage
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the neon lights with long exposure light trails from vehicles
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
tall modern street lamps illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon signs from towering skyscrapers. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk, passing palm trees, then steps onto a broad crosswalk with yellow stripes to cross the multi-lane road where vehicles leave light trails. Other pedestrians with umbrellas are visible crossing in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with overpass and digital billboards

events.description: passing underneath the large concrete overpass bridge that spans the street
emerging from under the overpass into brighter neon-lit area with more visible advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the palm trees and under the overpass bridge

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure spanning across the street with stairs on the side
large illuminated advertising screens on the right side of the street
black and yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit sidewalk, the camera approaches and passes underneath a large concrete overpass that temporarily darkens the scene. Digital billboards become visible on the right side of the street, and traffic bollards line the pedestrian path. The wet street continues to reflect the city lights as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with large commercial billboards and construction barriers

events.description: turning left toward a building entrance with teal lighting
approaching the dark entrance passage leading away from the main street

agents.ego_description: walking past construction barriers and large billboards while approaching a building entrance

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers with yellow warning lights on top
tall illuminated advertisement screens showing various characters and products
dark entrance to a building with teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street past the overpass, the camera walks alongside construction barriers on the left and large vertical digital billboards on the right. The scene transitions as the camera turns left toward a building entrance with distinctive teal lighting, moving away from the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian passage with intense pink neon lighting and stairs

events.description: entering the narrow passage illuminated by intense magenta and pink neon strips
beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the neon-lit passage and climbing the stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: intense magenta neon tubes lining the ceiling and walls of the passage
wide staircase leading upward with graffiti on the side walls
walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
illuminated vending machine with bright display on the right side
metal railings along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow pedestrian passage bathed in intense pink and magenta neon light. The environment shifts from the open street to an enclosed corridor with graffiti-covered walls and a vending machine. The camera then begins ascending a wide concrete staircase, with the pink neon glow intensifying as it climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with illuminated cherry blossom trees

events.description: emerging from the stairs into the open plaza with cherry blossom trees
passing between the illuminated cherry trees with pink glowing branches

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza admiring the illuminated cherry blossom trees and surroundings

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the plaza toward the far end

entered.detail: cherry blossom trees with branches illuminated by pink and white lights
concrete seating areas along the left side of the plaza
tall vertical signs with Japanese characters and advertisements
small vendor stalls with warm lighting on the left side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the scene opens into an elevated plaza featuring magnificent cherry blossom trees with branches illuminated by pink lights. The ground is paved with tiles, and vertical banners hang in the distance. The camera walks through this serene neon-lit garden area, passing benches and food stalls while following a pedestrian ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling, rain-slicked cyberpunk thoroughfare into a serene, neon-lit elevated garden. It begins by traversing a wide crosswalk amidst towering skyscrapers and light-trailing vehicles, moving along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees. As the camera passes beneath a darkening concrete overpass, the open street gives way to a corridor of digital billboards and construction barriers before turning away from the main road toward a teal-lit entrance. The scene then shifts into a narrow, enclosed passage bathed in intense magenta neon and graffiti, where the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the climb opens into an elevated plaza, transitioning from the cramped corridor to a spacious garden featuring illuminated cherry blossom trees and quiet pedestrian stalls.
